# Builder.Contractors

Builder.Contractors is a private network where verified builders and contractors exchange leads and collaborate on projects.

## Primary value for customers
- Exchange vetted referrals with trusted builder and contractor partners.
- Expand into new regions while maintaining service quality.
- Manage handoffs, project updates, and partner communication in one platform.

## Core pages
- Builder.Contractors - Exchange Leads, Grow Together: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/
- About Builder.Contractors: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/about
- How Builder.Contractors Works: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/how-it-works
- Builder.Contractors FAQ: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/faq
- Pricing for Builder.Contractors: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/pricing
- Lead Exchange Workflow for Builders and Contractors: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/lead-exchange-workflow
- Partner Verification Framework: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/partner-verification
- Multi-Region Handoff Governance: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/multi-region-handoff-governance
- Lead Routing Signals and Matching Rules: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/lead-routing-signals
- Partner Verification Evidence Checklist: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/verification-evidence-checklist
- Regional Handoff Playbooks: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/regional-handoff-playbooks
